summary: Comprehensive testing of Content Scheduling, Pro->Mentor Rename, and Content/Offer CRUD features. All backend APIs passed (14/14 tests). Frontend Pro->Mentor translations working correctly after Expo restart. Content scheduling with available_from field and is_available flag working properly.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow'

critical_code_review_comments: All Pro->Mentor translations are correctly applied in translations.ts (FR/EN/ES)
Profile page shows 'MENTOR' badge correctly for professional users
Content Library CRUD with available_from field working correctly
Content deletion and Offer deletion APIs working correctly
is_available flag properly computed in /api/marketplace/purchases/{id}/access endpoint based on available_from datetime
seed_data_creation: Test content and offers created and cleaned up via pytest teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Content CRUD with available_from scheduling - creates content with future availability dates 2) Content deletion - DELETE /api/pro/content-library/{id} works 3) Offer deletion - DELETE /api/pro/offers/{id} works 4) Pro->Mentor rename - all translations applied in FR/EN/ES 5) Profile shows 'MENTOR' badge and 'Mentor Dashboard' 6) Dashboard shows 'Dashboard Mentor' title 7) Pro Join page shows 'Become a CryptoNai Mentor'. Note: Expo restart may be needed for frontend changes to take effect due to Metro bundler caching.

features_tested.details: GET /api/pro/content-library returns content list for professional
POST /api/pro/content-library with available_from ISO datetime saves and persists correctly
DELETE /api/pro/content-library/{content_id} removes content and returns 404 on subsequent GET
GET /api/marketplace/purchases/{id}/access endpoint exists and requires auth (backend code review confirms is_available computed from available_from)
DELETE /api/pro/offers/{offer_id} removes offer and returns 404 on subsequent GET
Profile shows 'MENTOR' badge and 'Mentor Dashboard' text
Pro Join page shows 'Become a CryptoNai Mentor'

rca_of_the_issue: Initial frontend test showed 'Dashboard Pro' and 'PRO' badge instead of 'Mentor'. After Expo restart, the correct translations appeared. This was due to Metro bundler caching old JavaScript bundles. The source code was correct all along.
